message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Worker for T3 Auth API">
You are worker-3, member of team dev-taskflow-m1m2m3m6.
Superior: Team Lead (TL).
Allowed contacts: TL only.
Do NOT SendMessage anyone else. No peer communication.

YOUR TASK:
T3: M1 — Auth Service + Controller + Error Handling
Build AuthService, AuthController, GlobalExceptionHandler, ResourceNotFoundException, and ErrorResponse.

Acceptance criteria (M1-auth AC1-AC14):
- POST /api/auth/register: validate → save User (bcrypt password) → 201 {id, username, displayName}
- POST /api/auth/login: find user by username → verify password with BCrypt → generate JWT → 200 {token, expiresIn:86400}
- GET /api/auth/me: extract userId from JWT SecurityContext → find user → 200 {id, username, displayName}
- 409 on duplicate username
- 401 on bad credentials (BR7: do NOT distinguish "user not found" vs "wrong password")
- 400 on validation failures (username pattern, password length, displayName)
- GlobalExceptionHandler: @RestControllerAdvice, handle MethodArgumentNotValidException→400, ResourceNotFoundException→404, DataIntegrityViolationException→409
- ErrorResponse: message(String), timestamp(Instant or LocalDateTime)

CRITICAL IMPLEMENTATION NOTES:
- /api/auth/** is permitAll() in SecurityConfig, so /api/auth/me needs to manually get the Authentication from SecurityContext
- expiresIn in LoginResponse MUST be 86400 (seconds), NOT milliseconds
- Password must NOT appear in any response (register response uses UserResponse, not User)
- Use @Valid on request bodies for bean validation

File Scope:
- ALLOWED: taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/AuthService.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/AuthController.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/exception/ResourceNotFoundException.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/ErrorResponse.java
- READONLY: taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepository.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtUtil.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/RegisterRequest.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/LoginRequest.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/LoginResponse.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/UserResponse.java
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN

REQUIRED READING (do this FIRST):
1. PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/2026-03-09-PLAN.md
2. CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/2026-03-09-CONTRACT.md
3. Test files: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/AuthControllerTest.java
4. Implementation notes: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/temp/impl-notes-3.md
5. ALL READONLY files listed above (understand existing User entity, JwtUtil API, SecurityConfig, DTOs)

YOUR JOB:
- Write code that passes ALL 29 tests in AuthControllerTest.java
- Stay strictly within File Scope

PARALLEL AWARENESS:
ONLY run YOUR test files:
cd C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend && mvn test -Dtest="AuthControllerTest" -pl .
Do NOT run the full test suite.

SCOPE ENFORCEMENT:
- ALLOWED: edit freely
- READONLY: read only
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN
- Need out-of-scope file → SendMessage TL

LOG WRITING:
Write to C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/logs/worker-3.log.md (append-only):
On start: [LOG] task=T3 | event=start | files=service/AuthService.java,controller/AuthController.java,exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java,exception/ResourceNotFoundException.java,dto/ErrorResponse.java
On issues: [LOG] task=T3 | event=issue | detail={description}
Before completion: [LOG] task=T3 | event=complete | files-changed={list} | tests-passed={all|partial}
[METRICS] model=sonnet | input=n/a | output=n/a | duration={estimated_seconds}s

COMPLETION SEQUENCE:
1. Verify all 29 tests pass
1.5. Run `git diff --name-only` → compare against ALLOWED list. Revert out-of-scope.
2. Write final log entries
3. SendMessage TL: task ID, status, tests passed/failed, changed files list
4. Wait for TL response, then approve shutdown
</teammate-message>

1→[SECTION] Project Overview
     2→[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow backend (Auth+CRUD+StateMachine) and frontend (TaskListPage) as a Spring Boot 3 + Vue 3 full-stack app
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Spring Security + JWT (jjwt 0.12.5) | Vue 3 + Pinia + Vue Router + Axios | Vitest + jsdom for frontend tests | spring-boot-starter-test for backend tests
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, package com.taskflow.{layer} | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods | DTO suffix for data transfer objects (e.g. TaskResponse, RegisterRequest)
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] Max 5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft-delete for tasks (deleted=true) | JWT 24h expiry | No M4/M5 — assignee shows "未指派", tags empty | H2 create-drop (no migrations)
     6→[SHARED] taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java
     7→
     8→[SECTION] Standards

    19→[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format: {message:string, timestamp:ISO8601} via GlobalExceptionHandler | auth: JWT Bearer token in Authorization header, userId extracted from token claims | password: bcrypt via PasswordEncoder bean | soft-delete: Task.deleted=true, all queries exclude deleted | pagination: PageResponse{content,page,size,totalElements,totalPages} | status-colors: TODO=#6B7280 IN_PROGRESS=#3B82F6 DONE=#10B981 CLOSED=#EF4444 | priority-colors: HIGH=#EF4444 MEDIUM=#F59E0B LOW=#10B981

    28→[TASK] id=T7 | name=M6 — Frontend Infrastructure + Store | spec=S4 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=Pinia store+axios+router, complex mocking in tests

    30→

[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, package com.taskflow.{layer} | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods | DTO suffix for data transfer objects (e.g. TaskResponse, RegisterRequest)
[CONSTRAINTS] Max 5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft-delete for tasks (deleted=true) | JWT 24h expiry | No M4/M5 — assignee shows "未指派", tags empty | H2 create-drop (no migrations)
[SHARED] taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java

[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format: {message:string, timestamp:ISO8601} via GlobalExceptionHandler | auth: JWT Bearer token in Authorization header, userId extracted from token claims | password: bcrypt via PasswordEncoder bean | soft-delete: Task.deleted=true, all queries exclude deleted | pagination: PageResponse{content,page,size,totalElements,totalPages} | status-colors: TODO=#6B7280 IN_PROGRESS=#3B82F6 DONE=#10B981 CLOSED=#EF4444 | priority-colors: HIGH=#EF4444 MEDIUM=#F59E0B LOW=#10B981

1→# Implementation Notes — T3: Auth Service + Controller + Error Handling
     2→
     3→## Test Design Summary
     4→
     5→29 integration tests written using `@SpringBootTest` + `@AutoConfigureMockMvc`.
     6→All tests are HTTP-level (MockMvc), so they test the full stack without importing AuthService/AuthController directly.
     7→
     8→## Files Worker Must Create (5 files max)
     9→
    10→1. **AuthService** (`com.taskflow.service.AuthService`)
    11→   - `register(RegisterRequest)` → validate uniqueness, bcrypt password, save User, return UserResponse
    12→   - `login(LoginRequest)` → find user, verify password, generate JWT, return LoginResponse with expiresIn=86400
    13→   - `getCurrentUser(Long userId)` → find user by id, return UserResponse
    14→
    15→2. **AuthController** (`com.taskflow.controller.AuthController`)
    16→   - `POST /api/auth/register` → `@Valid @RequestBody RegisterRequest`, return 201
    17→   - `POST /api/auth/login` → `@RequestBody LoginRequest`, return 200
    18→   - `GET /api/auth/me` → extract userId from SecurityContext (principal), return 200
    19→   - For `/me`: must check `authentication == null || !authentication.isAuthenticated()` and return 401
    20→     - Note: `/api/auth/**` is `permitAll()` in SecurityConfig, so Spring Security won't auto-reject
    21→     - The JwtAuthenticationFilter still sets SecurityContext if a valid token is present
    22→     - Controller must manually check authentication status
    23→
    24→3. **GlobalExceptionHandler** (`com.taskflow.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler`)
    25→   - `@RestControllerAdvice`
    26→   - Handle `MethodArgumentNotValidException` → 400 with ErrorResponse
    27→   - Handle duplicate key / `DataIntegrityViolationException` → 409 with ErrorResponse
    28→   - Handle `ResourceNotFoundException` → 404 with ErrorResponse
    29→   - Handle custom `UnauthorizedException` or use ResponseStatusException → 401
    30→
    31→4. **ResourceNotFoundException** (`com.taskflow.exception.ResourceNotFoundException`)
    32→   - Extends `RuntimeException`
    33→
    34→5. **ErrorResponse** (`com.taskflow.dto.ErrorResponse`)
    35→   - Fields: `String message`, `String timestamp` (ISO8601)
    36→
    37→## Key Constraints from Tests
    38→
    39→- Register returns 201 (not 200)
    40→- Login expiresIn must be exactly `86400` (seconds, not milliseconds)
    41→- Password must NOT appear in any response
    42→- BR7: Login error messages for wrong-password and non-existent-user must be IDENTICAL
    43→- `/api/auth/me` without valid token must return 401 (controller-level check needed since path is permitAll)
    44→- ErrorResponse format: `{message: string, timestamp: string}` — no other fields
    45→
    46→## SecurityConfig Note
    47→
    48→The existing SecurityConfig has `.requestMatchers("/api/auth/**").permitAll()` which means `/api/auth/me` is NOT auto-protected. The controller must manually verify authentication.
    49→

file.content:
# Implementation Notes — T3: Auth Service + Controller + Error Handling

## Test Design Summary

29 integration tests written using `@SpringBootTest` + `@AutoConfigureMockMvc`.
All tests are HTTP-level (MockMvc), so they test the full stack without importing AuthService/AuthController directly.

## Files Worker Must Create (5 files max)

1. **AuthService** (`com.taskflow.service.AuthService`)
   - `register(RegisterRequest)` → validate uniqueness, bcrypt password, save User, return UserResponse
   - `login(LoginRequest)` → find user, verify password, generate JWT, return LoginResponse with expiresIn=86400
   - `getCurrentUser(Long userId)` → find user by id, return UserResponse

2. **AuthController** (`com.taskflow.controller.AuthController`)
   - `POST /api/auth/register` → `@Valid @RequestBody RegisterRequest`, return 201
   - `POST /api/auth/login` → `@RequestBody LoginRequest`, return 200
   - `GET /api/auth/me` → extract userId from SecurityContext (principal), return 200
   - For `/me`: must check `authentication == null || !authentication.isAuthenticated()` and return 401
     - Note: `/api/auth/**` is `permitAll()` in SecurityConfig, so Spring Security won't auto-reject
     - The JwtAuthenticationFilter still sets SecurityContext if a valid token is present
     - Controller must manually check authentication status

3. **GlobalExceptionHandler** (`com.taskflow.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler`)
   - `@RestControllerAdvice`
   - Handle `MethodArgumentNotValidException` → 400 with ErrorResponse
   - Handle duplicate key / `DataIntegrityViolationException` → 409 with ErrorResponse
   - Handle `ResourceNotFoundException` → 404 with ErrorResponse
   - Handle custom `UnauthorizedException` or use ResponseStatusException → 401

4. **ResourceNotFoundException** (`com.taskflow.exception.ResourceNotFoundException`)
   - Extends `RuntimeException`

5. **ErrorResponse** (`com.taskflow.dto.ErrorResponse`)
   - Fields: `String message`, `String timestamp` (ISO8601)

## Key Constraints from Tests

- Register returns 201 (not 200)
- Login expiresIn must be exactly `86400` (seconds, not milliseconds)
- Password must NOT appear in any response
- BR7: Login error messages for wrong-password and non-existent-user must be IDENTICAL
- `/api/auth/me` without valid token must return 401 (controller-level check needed since path is permitAll)
- ErrorResponse format: `{message: string, timestamp: string}` — no other fields

## SecurityConfig Note

The existing SecurityConfig has `.requestMatchers("/api/auth/**").permitAll()` which means `/api/auth/me` is NOT auto-protected. The controller must manually verify authentication.

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"T3: M1 — Auth Service + Controller + Error Handling","description":"Spec: M1-auth.md
Complexity: MED

建立認證服務、控制器與全域錯誤處理。

Files (ALLOWED):
- taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/AuthService.java
- taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/AuthController.java

- taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/ErrorResponse.java

- taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java
- taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepository.java
- taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtUtil.java

- taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/LoginRequest.java
- taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/LoginResponse.java
- taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/UserResponse.java

AC (M1-auth AC1~AC14):
- POST /api/auth/register: validate → save (bcrypt) → 201 {id,username,displayName}
- POST /api/auth/login: authenticate → generateToken → 200 {token,expiresIn:86400}
- GET /api/auth/me: extract userId from JWT → 200 {id,username,displayName}
- 409 on duplicate username, 401 on bad credentials (BR7: no account enumeration), 400 on validation
- GlobalExceptionHandler: handle MethodArgumentNotValidException(400), ResourceNotFoundException(404), DuplicateKeyException/DataIntegrityViolation(409)
- ErrorResponse: message(String), timestamp(Instant)","assignedBy":"worker-3","timestamp":"2026-03-09T04:45:42.441Z"}
</teammate-message>
